name: Melanotan I
subtitle: Melanocortin Receptor Agonist
overview: Synthetic analog of α-MSH that selectively targets MC1 receptors for melanin stimulation. FDA-approved as SCENESSE implant for erythropoietic protoporphyria (EPP). Research-grade injectable form enables flexible dosing versus the implant version.
mechanism: Subcutaneous injection delivers peptide directly into systemic circulation. Selectively activates MC1R receptors to stimulate melanin production. Short half-life of approximately 30 minutes necessitates multiple daily dosing for sustained effect.
keyBenefits: Precise dosing control with rapid tanning onset
Flexible home administration unlike implant version
Visible tanning within 1-2 weeks with UV exposure
More selective for MC1R than Melanotan II

items.name: Enhanced Tanning Response
items.description: Stimulates melanin for deeper, longer-lasting tans with reduced UV requirements

items.name: Photoprotection
items.description: Increased melanin density provides natural UV protection and reduces sunburn

items.name: Even Pigmentation
items.description: Promotes uniform melanin distribution minimizing patchy tanning

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous injection with rotation between abdomen, thigh, and upper arm.

steps: Clean vial top with alcohol pad
Solution should be clear and colorless
Store refrigerated for up to 4 weeks

deliveryMethods.overview: Lower bioavailability (20-30%) compared to injection but more convenient.

interactions.notes: Reduces required UV dose by approximately 50%
Retinoids increase photosensitivity; monitor skin reactions

timeline.effects: Possible mild nausea, facial flushing, reduced appetite
Initial skin darkening, increased mole/freckle pigmentation
Noticeable tanning with minimal UV exposure
Peak effects, maintained pigmentation with reduced frequency

monitoring: Maintain UV protection despite enhanced tanning

quickStats.frequency: Loading phase: 1-2x daily for 1-2 weeks, then maintenance 2-3x weekly
quickStats.cycleDuration: 2-4 week loading phase, then ongoing maintenance as needed
quickStats.storage: Refrigerate reconstituted solution at 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks
